AI Assistant for Plumbers

Run Your Plumbing Business Smarter with Our AI Office Manager

Sophiie is AI Office Manager for plumbers that captures calls and online enquiries, schedules jobs, and keeps all communication in one central hub. Fewer hours on admin. More time on the tools. Happier clients.

Get Started Free Learn more

"I have been nothing if not super impressed with everything about this. The product itself is amazing and really easy to set up, and the support is fantastic as well. Very much loving Sophiie at the moment!"

Receive a phone call from Sophiie

No credit card required. No obligation. Just results.

How AI office manager grows your plumbing business

Never Miss a Customer Call Again

With 24/7 AI call handling, Sophiie filters repairs, installs and service requests instantly. Each booking drops into your calendar while urgent jobs get escalated to your on-call team.

Easy AI Scheduling for Plumbers

Sophiie analyses your schedules, notes site addresses and job duration to optimise bookings. Confirmations and behaviourally framed reminders drive punctuality and cut no-shows.

Smart Office Manager for Plumbers

Keep every job detail in a single timeline from first call to final payment (assignments, notes, site photos, status). Centralised digital records support compliance audits.

AI Messaging for Plumbers

Unify SMS and email so quotes, confirmations and "on-the-way" ETAs send automatically, with replies linked to the job. This mirrors how Australians communicate.

Implement an AI Chatbot for Website

Revolutionise your site's visitor experience with Sophiie, a cutting-edge AI Chatbot. Perfectly integrated, it provides instant, accurate information, enhancing engagement and trust.

Personalise Your AI with Sophiie's Training

Get an AI that thinks and speaks like you. Our advanced Train Sophiie capability allows you to imbue your AI assistant with your business's unique voice and knowledge.

Easy Set Up Steps

Set Up Your AI Engine

Configure Sophiie's AI core by defining your service matrix, pricing rules, and operational regions for intelligent job qualification.

Sync with Accounting & CRM

Ensure real-time data synchronisation by connecting your accounting software (Xero) and existing field service management tools (e.g., ServiceM8) instantly.

Unify Communication Channels

Consolidate all incoming inquiries. Route phone calls, web chat messages, and form submissions into Sophiie's system for instant, centralised management.

Activate Job Lifecycle Management

Take control of the full process. Automated call answering, job bookings, and messaging run concurrently, managing the entire job lifecycle with minimal input.

Other Businesses We Serve

AI Tools for Electricians

AI solutions that help electricians respond instantly to urgent fault calls, automate scheduling, and capture more high-value jobs.

AI for HVAC Business

AI tools that help HVAC technicians answer calls instantly, manage bookings, and respond faster to urgent jobs.

AI Tools for Landscaping

AI solutions that help landscapers secure more bookings, manage scheduling, and respond faster to client inquiries.

AI Tools & Solutions for Carpenters

AI solutions designed to help carpenters automate calls, manage bookings, and stay organised.

AI for Builders

AI-powered tools that help builders streamline calls, manage job schedules, and stay responsive to clients.

Frequently Asked Questions

Quick solutions to frequently asked questions about Sophiie AI's features, setup and integration.

Yes. Use Zapier or API to push contacts, deals, and activities to your existing CRM. Field names can be mapped during setup to ensure data consistency.
We offer simple, transparent plans with monthly billing. Pricing scales by seats and usage so solo plumbers, growing service teams, and multi-crew contractors only pay for what they need.
Sign up, connect your existing calendar and Xero, add your plumbing services and rates, import client contacts, and then switch on AI phone answering and booking. Most teams go live the same day, and we provide comprehensive in-app guidance for setup.
Yes. Two-way calendar sync (Google Calendar/Outlook) keeps your plumbing scheduling accurate, and Zapier integration can support other data synchronisation.
Yes. AI phone answering runs all day and night with emergency routing to on-call staff, plus transcripts and recordings are stored for audit and compliance.
Yes. Sophiie syncs with Google Calendar, Outlook, and ServiceM8. Availability is checked to avoid double-bookings or clashes, and plumbing jobs can be assigned directly to the right technician.

Work Smarter, Not Harder with Sophiie

Sophiie is built to support the trades industry, giving you the freedom to focus on your craft while she handles the admin. From the first customer call to the final job summary, Sophiie ensures your business runs smoothly.
